_description: Paste this JSON into Lovable, Replit, or ChatGPT to generate 3 side-by-side UI mockup variants for the AgenticOS Universal Hub. Pick the variant you like, paste the design code back into Claude Code, and we wire the backend.
task: Generate 3 side-by-side UI mockup variants for the AgenticOS Universal Hub dashboard

layout_requirements.structure: Three-panel layout: left sidebar (ProjectSwitcher 200px), center main (AgentCards grid), right panel (PhaseCard + approval)
layout_requirements.top_bar: Connection status LED, project name, agent count badge, Tailscale indicator
layout_requirements.sidebar: Scrollable project list with status dots, active project highlighted, skill badges below name
layout_requirements.main_area: Agent cards in 2-col grid, each card shows: agent_id, status pill, progress bar, stage label, stuck/loop badges
layout_requirements.right_panel: PhaseCard at top (what to do now, high contrast), MobileApproval buttons below (large, phone-safe tap targets)

components: ProjectSwitcher — left sidebar with active project highlight and status dots
PhaseCard — top banner showing current task in large readable text
AgentCard — grid card with status glow, progress bar, context meter
ApprovalButtons — three full-width buttons: Approve (green), Research (amber), Review (purple)
MobileApproval — large-button approval panel optimised for 6-inch phone screen
SkillBadge — small chips showing active skill packages
ConnectionStatusBar — WebSocket health indicator with Tailscale dot
StuckBadge — pulsing red indicator when agent is stuck
LoopBadge — animated loop icon when agent is in a tight loop

constraints.font: IBM Plex Mono or JetBrains Mono
constraints.card_style: glassmorphism with subtle border glow matching agent status color
constraints.animations: minimal — only status transitions and stuck pulse

Tactical Dark.vibe: military ops center, dark navy/charcoal, amber accents, no rounded corners
Tactical Dark.sidebar_style: monospace list, rank-badge style project indicators
Tactical Dark.card_glow: amber or red for errors, green for complete

Neon Glass.vibe: sci-fi holographic, deep space blue/purple, neon cyan/violet glows
Neon Glass.sidebar_style: frosted glass panels, floating project pills
Neon Glass.card_glow: electric blue for active, neon violet for waiting

Military Terminal.vibe: CRT terminal aesthetic, dark green on black, scanlines, monospace only
Military Terminal.sidebar_style: ASCII-bordered menu list, blinking cursor on selected
Military Terminal.card_glow: phosphor green, status shown as text codes not colors

output_format: Three side-by-side images (1200x800 each) with variant label below and 2-sentence description per variant. Also provide the React/Tailwind code for the selected variant on request.

ai_architecture_influence.note: The UI should feel like it was designed by an AI systems architect who knows SSMs, GNNs, and Transformers — each agent card subtly reflects its domain (game-dev gets green, software-eng gets blue, va-advisory gets amber). The PhaseCard is inspired by a naval tactical display: clear, hierarchical, one dominant action.
